parameters.query: Resources | where subscriptionId in~ ('99999999-9999-9999-9999-999999999999') | where type =~ 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses' | where isnull(properties.ipConfiguration) | where isnull(properties.natGateway) | project id, name, subscriptionId, resourceGroup, location, skuName=tostring(sku.name), allocationMethod=tostring(properties.publicIPAllocationMethod), ipConfigurationId=tostring(properties.ipConfiguration.id), natGatewayId=tostring(properties.natGateway.id)
